simpleDefinition: to move with your legs at a regular pace
exampleSentence: I walk to the park every day.
exampleThai: ฉันเดินไปสวนสาธารณะทุกวัน
imagePrompt: A person walking happily in a bright park, simple colorful illustration.

simpleDefinition: to move very quickly with your legs
exampleThai: เด็กผู้ชายสามารถวิ่งได้เร็ว
imagePrompt: A boy running fast on a track, simple colorful illustration.

simpleDefinition: to push yourself up into the air using your legs
exampleSentence: The dog jumps over the fence.
exampleThai: สุนัขกระโดดข้ามรั้ว
imagePrompt: A happy dog jumping over a small fence, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to move through water
exampleThai: ปลาว่ายน้ำในทะเล
imagePrompt: A cute fish swimming in blue water, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to make musical sounds with your voice
exampleThai: เธอชอบร้องเพลงเสียงดัง
imagePrompt: A person singing with a microphone and music notes around, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to move your body to music
exampleThai: พวกเราเต้นที่งานปาร์ตี้
imagePrompt: People dancing happily at a party with music notes, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to do activities for fun and enjoyment
exampleSentence: They play football in the afternoon.
exampleThai: พวกเขาเล่นฟุตบอลในตอนบ่าย
imagePrompt: Kids playing with a ball in a park, simple colorful illustration.

simpleDefinition: to rest with your eyes closed
exampleThai: ทารกนอนหลับเยอะมาก
imagePrompt: A person sleeping peacefully in a comfortable bed, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to stop sleeping
exampleSentence: I wake up early in the morning.
exampleThai: ฉันตื่นแต่เช้าตรู่
imagePrompt: A person waking up stretching arms in the morning sun, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to put food in your mouth, chew, and swallow it
exampleThai: พวกเรากินข้าวเป็นอาหารเย็น
imagePrompt: A person eating a bowl of rice with a spoon, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to take liquid into your mouth and swallow it
exampleThai: ฉันดื่มน้ำทุกวัน
imagePrompt: A person drinking water from a glass, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to look at words and understand them

exampleThai: เขาอ่านหนังสือก่อนนอน
imagePrompt: A person reading a book comfortably, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to make words on paper
exampleThai: กรุณาเขียนชื่อของคุณตรงนี้
imagePrompt: A hand holding a pen and writing on a piece of paper, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to say words to someone
exampleSentence: I talk to my friend on the phone.
exampleThai: ฉันพูดคุยกับเพื่อนทางโทรศัพท์

simpleDefinition: to pay attention to sounds
exampleSentence: We listen to music in the car.

imagePrompt: A person wearing headphones and listening to music, simple illustration.

simpleDefinition: to turn your eyes toward something

simpleDefinition: to make something not closed

simpleDefinition: to shut something

simpleDefinition: to rest on a chair or the ground

simpleDefinition: to be on your feet

simpleDefinition: to make a picture with a pen or pencil

simpleDefinition: to make a happy face

simpleDefinition: to have tears fall from your eyes because you are sad
